title: SSRF DNS check called up to 4 times per Follow per inbox URI
description: In handle_inbox 'Follow' branch, is_private_host_resolved is called separately for follower_actor (1×), shared_inbox_uri (1×), and inbox_uri (1×). In fan_out→process_batch, it is called again at delivery time. For a single Follow the inbox domain may be resolved 3 times in the same request. Each call does a real DNS lookup with no caching. If the same host appears in both inbox_uri and shared_inbox_uri, it is resolved twice. A small TTL-aware cache or a single resolution per host per request would eliminate redundant syscalls on the hot Follow path.
close_reason: Accepted: ponytail comment. Called at each trust boundary, OS DNS cache amortizes.
